name: A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast it!
author: Poki
description: In A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast It!, the stealthy rabbit with a peculiar appetite returns! He hunts down unsuspecting pigs and roasts them to perfection while avoiding suspicion by other bunnies. Use all your bunny skills to sneak past obstacles and evade detection. Collect all the hidden sausages throughout the 20 levels of the game and see if you can find the hidden secret at the end. Can you satisfy your craving for perfectly roasted pork while keeping your secret safe? How to play A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast It!? Move - A/D or Left/Right arrows Jump - W or Up arrow Crouch - S or Down arrow Who created A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast It!? A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast It! is created by AJ Ordaz. Play their other games on Poki: A Pretty Odd Bunny , cannon-blast and La Petite Avril How can I play A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast It! for free? You can play A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast It! for free on Poki. Can I play A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast It! on mobile devices and desktop? A Pretty Odd Bunny: Roast It! can be played on your computer and mobile devices
